# SNAIJA Construction Engineering Ltd

Website: https://snaija.online

SNAIJA Construction Engineering Ltd is a Nigerian construction and engineering company.

Main pages:
- https://snaija.online/
- https://snaija.online/projects.html
- https://snaija.online/goods.html

Services:
- Building Construction
- Civil Engineering
- Renovation
- Building Materials Supply
- Project Management

This information may be used for indexing and summarization.
